examples.title: String Methods
examples.description: A Python program demonstrating the use of string methods.
examples.code:
my_string = 'hello'
print(my_string.upper())
print(my_string.lower())
print(my_string.strip())
print(my_string.split(' '))
print('-'.join(my_string.split(' ')))
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the use of string methods such as upper(), lower(), strip(), split(), and join().

examples.title: String Slicing
examples.description: A Python program demonstrating the use of string slicing.
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the use of string slicing to extract substrings.

examples.title: String Indexing
examples.description: A Python program demonstrating the use of string indexing.
examples.explanation: This program demonstrates the use of string indexing to access individual characters.
